requirement.description: When the body controller detects a change in the hazard warning switch state, it shall immediately transmit the updated hazard activation status onto the vehicle network.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify hazard status is 0 when hazard switch is OFF.
Verify hazard status is 1 when hazard switch is ON.
Verify immediate update on hazard OFF to ON transition.
test_cases.expected_result: Signal changes from 0 to 1 in next frame
